props.name: name
props.description: A name identifier for the form. Useful for debugging complex forms with multiple nested forms.

props.name: status
props.description: The initialization status of the form. Set to "initializing" while loading external state, then "complete" when ready.

events.name: onComplete
events.description: Callback fired when the form is completed.

events.name: onInit
events.description: Callback fired when the form is initialized.

events.name: onStateChange
events.description: Callback fired when the form state changes.

props.name: name
props.description: A name identifier for the form. Useful for debugging complex forms with multiple nested forms.

props.name: status
props.description: The initialization status of the form. Set to "initializing" while loading external state, then "complete" when ready.

events.name: onComplete
events.description: Emits when the form is complete. Emits the form state.

events.name: onInit
events.description: Emits when the form is initialized.

events.name: onStateChange
events.description: Emits when the form state changes. Emits the updated form state.

props.name: name
props.description: A name identifier for the form. Useful for debugging complex forms with multiple nested forms.

props.name: status
props.description: The initialization status of the form. Set to "initializing" while loading external state, then "complete" when ready.
